release_notes: iPos Sync Agent v0.6.1 adds Meta Product Set (Collection WhatsApp) rollout grouped by parent category, fixes a PermissionError writing Meta Catalog sync result files under Program Files (now stored under %LOCALAPPDATA%\iPos Sync Agent\), moves category/taxonomy mapping from hardcoded constants to an external, auto-seeded category_mapping.json, and fixes product gallery images not being sent to Meta Catalog. No changes to WooCommerce sync logic, pricing, or the Batch API/STOP SYNC/index fixes from v0.6.0.
